scripts.typecheck: bash -n scripts/check-agent-docs-drift.sh scripts/doc-gardening.sh scripts/open-exec-plan.sh scripts/close-exec-plan.sh scripts/committer scripts/package-audit-context.sh scripts/repo-tools.config.sh && tsc -p tsconfig.tools.json --pretty false && pnpm typecheck:packages && pnpm build
scripts.typecheck:packages: pnpm --dir packages/contracts typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/core typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/importers typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/query typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bash scripts/check-agent-docs-drift.sh && pnpm test:packages && node --import=tsx e2e/smoke/verify-fixtures.ts
scripts.test:packages: pnpm --dir packages/contracts test && pnpm --dir packages/core test && pnpm --dir packages/importers test && pnpm --dir packages/query test && pnpm --dir packages/cli test
scripts.test:coverage: bash scripts/doc-gardening.sh --fail-on-issues && pnpm test:packages && node --import=tsx e2e/smoke/verify-fixtures.ts --coverage && pnpm no-js
scripts.verify:cli: pnpm --dir packages/cli typecheck && pnpm --dir packages/cli test
scripts.verify:repo: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm test:coverage
